reason: Chain-of-thought (CoT) is a fundamental reasoning skill that improves accuracy for complex questions. I have 1 SP available and this will help ensure I answer the next question correctly to regain SP quickly.

Unlocking pe_plan provides a planning and reflection phase, which significantly increases accuracy for higher-level questions. With 1 SP available and 3 XP needed for the next threshold, this is the most strategic investment before attempting a Level 3 door.

Unlocking Reflection++ will provide a second LLM call to review and correct my answer, significantly increasing the accuracy of my responses and protecting my HP as I progress to higher-level questions.
